home.tagline.message: VContainer DI · UI System · Table Loader · Addressables · Localization — in a single Unity package.

home.meta.desc.message: Unity development toolkit — VContainer DI, UI System, Addressables, Localization, Table Loader.

home.feature.di.desc.message: Register and resolve services through AchEngineInstaller and ServiceLocator — no direct VContainer use required.

home.feature.managers.desc.message: AudioManager, AchSceneManager, PoolManager, SaveManager — core services with a consistent API.

home.feature.ui.desc.message: Layer-based view management, pooling, and transition animations in one.

home.feature.table.desc.message: Auto-generate C# models from Google Sheets and consume them with type safety.

home.feature.addressables.desc.message: Auto-groups, reference-counted caching, scene-scoped lifetime — production-ready asset loading.

home.feature.localization.desc.message: JSON / CSV multilingual workflow, locale switching, key constant generation.
